summary: Frontend E2E test of HR Employee Termination ('إنهاء خدمات') feature. All 7 scenarios from the review request pass: terminate button visible/clickable, red strikethrough + badge applied, payout & reinstate buttons appear, payout shows correct toast with amount+branch and disables the button, reinstate returns employee to active state and deletes the owner_withdrawal (verified in mongo), archive toggle works, and the salary-report tab shows the same red payout / reinstate buttons for terminated_pending employees.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/HR.js is 5214 lines — should be split into smaller modules (Employees tab, Salary Report tab, Attendance tab) for maintainability.
handleTerminate / handleTerminatePayout / handleReinstate use window.confirm — consider replacing with the shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with the rest of the app (also helps E2E testability).
seed_data_creation: Seeded employees EMP-UITEST (branch الفرع الرئيسي, salary 600,000, monthly), 10 attendance rows for 2026-06, and owner_deposits DEP-UITEST (1,000,000). All seeded data and owner_withdrawals were CLEANED UP at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Termination feature is fully functional end-to-end. Verified evidence: badge text 'إنهاء خدمات', .line-through on the name, payout toast 'تم صرف المستحقات: 200,000 IQD — الفرع الرئيسي', payout button disabled after success, badge disappears after reinstate, archive toggle present (data-testid='toggle-archive-btn'), salary-report tab exposes report-terminate-payout-{id} and report-reinstate-{id}. After payout+reinstate the owner_withdrawal row for the employee is correctly removed (verified in mongo). HR splash takes ~10s on first load. Settlement preview used in toast is computed from attendance × salary; with 10 present days of 8h on a 600,000 monthly salary the disbursement showed 200,000 IQD.
